'''zhafogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadener|deadener]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadener|deadener]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhafogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfegeth|zhæfegeth]] || [[word:zhæfegej|zhæfegej]] || [[word:zhæfegesh|zhæfegesh]] || [[word:zhæfege|zhæfege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafofogoth|zhafofogoth]] || [[word:zhafofogoj|zhafofogoj]] || [[word:zhafofogosh|zhafofogosh]] || [[word:zhafofogo|zhafofogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafogoth|zhafogoth]] || [[word:zhafogoj|zhafogoj]] || [[word:zhafogosh|zhafogosh]] || [[word:zhafogo|zhafogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafofgoth|zhafofgoth]] || [[word:zhafofgoj|zhafofgoj]] || [[word:zhafofgosh|zhafofgosh]] || [[word:zhafofgof|zhafofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafogotho|zhafogotho]] || [[word:zhafogojo|zhafogojo]] || [[word:zhafogosho|zhafogosho]] || [[word:zhafogoko|zhafogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafogoth|zhafogoth]] || [[word:zhafogoj|zhafogoj]] || [[word:zhafogosh|zhafogosh]] || [[word:zhafogo|zhafogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafogothol|zhafogothol]] || [[word:zhafogojol|zhafogojol]] || [[word:zhafogoshol|zhafogoshol]] || [[word:zhafogokol|zhafogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafogothotho|zhafogothotho]] || [[word:zhafogojojo|zhafogojojo]] || [[word:zhafogoshosho|zhafogoshosho]] || [[word:zhafogoko|zhafogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafogothon|zhafogothon]] || [[word:zhafogojon|zhafogojon]] || [[word:zhafogoshon|zhafogoshon]] || [[word:zhafogokon|zhafogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafogothoro|zhafogothoro]] || [[word:zhafogojoro|zhafogojoro]] || [[word:zhafogoshoro|zhafogoshoro]] || [[word:zhafogokoro|zhafogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
